key.name: volume
key.description: Volume to set when playing lofi

key.name: radios
key.default: ['Lofi Radio - https://play.streamafrica.net/lofiradio', 'Lofi Hunter - https://live.hunter.fm/lofi_high', 'Lofi Hip-hop - http://hyades.shoutca.st:8043/stream']

key.name: set-popup-max-height
key.description: If enabled, it will make the popup have a max height

key.name: popup-max-height
key.description: This will set the height for the popup

key.name: play-pause-quick-lofi
key.description: Toggle between playing and pausing Quick Lofi.

key.name: increase-volume
key.description: Increase Volume by system volume step.

key.name: decrease-volume
key.description: Decrease Volume by system volume step.

key.name: next
key.description: Go to the next playlist item or radio, following the playback flow.

key.name: previous
key.description: Go to the previous playlist item or radio, following the playback flow.

key.name: next-radio
key.description: Skip to the next radio, ignoring the current playlist.

key.name: previous-radio
key.description: Go to the previous radio, ignoring the current playlist.

key.name: indicator-actions
key.summary: Configure the behavior of indicator clicks.
key.description: Specifies which actions are triggered when the user clicks the indicator.

key.name: enable-debug
key.description: Generate detailed logs for error tracking and stack traces.

key.name: enable-mpris
key.description: Expose playback controls and metadata to the system via MPRIS.

key.name: enable-mini-player
key.description: Show a compact player with playback controls and progress in the menu.

key.name: show-mini-player-title
key.summary: Show Track Title in Mini Player
key.description: Show the currently playing track title in the mini player for playlists.

key.name: mpv-arguments
key.description: List of command-line arguments used when launching MPV.

key.name: cookies-from-browser
key.summary: Which Browser should mpv use for cookiej
key.description: List of command-line arguments used when launching MPV.
